overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along a desert highway toward the Los Santos skyline. The player character moves from the dirt shoulder onto the asphalt highway while traffic passes by, illuminated by streetlights under a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder with directional signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder beside the highway, approaching the green directional sign

notable_agents.action: semi-truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: large green highway sign indicating directions to Downtown Los Santos and East Vinewood
unpaved gravel and dirt area alongside the highway
desert hills and rocks on the left side of the highway
desert shrubs and vegetation on the right roadside
tall street light illuminating the highway
illuminated downtown buildings visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the dirt shoulder of a desert highway at night, with a large green highway sign for Downtown Los Santos visible ahead. The area is sparsely vegetated with desert shrubs, and vehicles pass by on the asphalt to the left under the glow of streetlights.

events.description: character steps from dirt shoulder onto the asphalt highway surface
camera briefly tilts upward to show the night sky with stars before returning to horizon level
passing the Route 13 highway shield sign on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the asphalt highway lane, moving with the flow of traffic toward the city skyline

notable_agents.action: white bus with 'Dashound' text passing by on the left

entered.detail: paved multi-lane highway surface with lane markings
white and black US Route 13 shield sign on the roadside

segments.scene_description: Having moved onto the asphalt highway, the camera continues walking toward the illuminated Los Santos skyline in the distance. The Route 13 sign appears on the right side around 44 seconds, while various vehicles including a bus pass by on the left. Streetlights line both sides of the highway, casting long shadows on the pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dusty desert shoulder onto a paved highway heading toward a distant urban skyline. It begins by walking along the dirt edge of the road amidst sparse desert shrubs, passing under the glow of streetlights with a large green sign for Downtown Los Santos visible ahead. As the camera transitions from the dirt onto the asphalt, the perspective shifts to face the illuminated Los Santos skyline shimmering in the distance. The scene then expands as the camera passes a Route 13 sign on the right while various vehicles, including a bus, stream past on the left. Finally, the movement continues forward along the highway, guided by the rhythmic spacing of streetlights that cast long shadows across the pavement.
